# Pull request

## What this changes

Brief description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] New benchmark item(s)
- [ ] New model adapter
- [ ] New metric
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`ruff format .`)
- [ ] Lint is clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] If adding a benchmark item: it has CC-BY-4.0-compatible sources, no PII, no operator-proprietary content
- [ ] If adding an adapter: tests use mocked HTTP, not real API calls
- [ ] If adding a metric: documented in README and tested

## Related issue

Closes #
